response.step_by_step_log: Watched the video to identify song metadata. The video shows the Hololive English cast performing a song, but no specific on-screen text identifies the song title or the original composer. The concert title "ALLFORONE" is featured heavily. Performed a search for "Re:PLAY" and "ALLFORONE" in relation to the concert, but no specific song lyrics were found. As no specific song title or artist could be definitively linked to the music, lyrics search was not successful.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the Hololive English 3rd Concert titled "ALLFORONE". It features a group performance with all members. No specific song title or artist is explicitly credited on-screen during the performance, other than the concert title itself. Therefore, specific lyrics cannot be identified or retrieved.

scenes.description: The entire group of Hololive English members performs a song together in a concert setting. The text "ALLFORONE" is displayed prominently.
